
### format string exploits 

<!-- \lstset{language=C} -->
 
```
printf("The command you entered ");
printf(command);
printf("was not recognized.\n");

```
 

* what if <code>command</code> is <code>%s</code>?


### viewing the stack  {.smaller}

<!-- \lstset{
    language={},
    style=smaller,
    moredelim={**[is][\color{blue!70!black}]{~in~}{~end~}},
    moredelim={**[is][\btHL<2|handout:0>]{~2~}{~end~}},
    moredelim={**[is][\btHL<3|handout:0>]{~3~}{~end~}},
    moredelim={**[is][\btHL<4|handout:0>]{~4~}{~end~}},
    moredelim={**[is][\btHL<5|handout:0>]{~5~}{~end~}},
} -->
 
 
<pre><code>$ <span style="color: blue!70!black">cat test-format.c</span>
#include &lt;stdio.h&gt;

int main(void) {
    char buffer\[100];
    while(fgets(buffer, sizeof buffer, stdin)) {
        printf(buffer);
    }
}
$ <span style="color: blue!70!black">./test-format.exe</span>
<span style="color: blue!70!black">%016lx %016lx %016lx %016lx %016lx %016lx %016lx %016lx</span>
<span data-fragment-index="3" class="fragment custom myem-only">00007fb54d0c6790</span> <span data-fragment-index="4" class="fragment custom myem-only">786c363130252078</span> <span data-fragment-index="4" class="fragment custom myem-only">0000000000ac6048</span> <span data-fragment-index="4" class="fragment custom myem-only">3631302520786c36</span>
<span data-fragment-index="4" class="fragment custom myem-only">3631302500000000</span> <span data-fragment-index="5" class="fragment custom myem-only">6c3631302520786c</span> 786c363130252078 <span data-fragment-index="2" class="fragment custom myem-only">20786c36313025</span>20
</code></pre>
 ![](/overflow-format/texfig/viewingTheStack.figure-1.svg){.absolute top="0%" left="0%" width=1050 height=600 .my-center  .fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}
![](/overflow-format/texfig/viewingTheStack.figure-2.svg){.absolute top="0%" left="0%" width=1050 height=600 .my-center  .fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}
![](/overflow-format/texfig/viewingTheStack.figure-3.svg){.absolute top="0%" left="0%" width=1050 height=600 .my-center  .fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=3}
![](/overflow-format/texfig/viewingTheStack.figure-4.svg){.absolute top="0%" left="0%" width=1050 height=600 .my-center  .fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=4}
![](/overflow-format/texfig/viewingTheStack.figure-5.svg){.absolute top="0%" left="0%" width=1050 height=600 .my-center  .fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=5}
